description: I went through several platforms, but with Radsystems I found an ideal IDE, where I work comfortably and with results.
author: Osvaldo C.
pros: the ease of making an application in very short time
cons: It is growing in bug fixes, but they are being corrected quickly.

review_title: I'm building web applications incredibly fast
description: It has an easy-to-use interface that allows me to quickly realize the project idea I have in mind. Even without writing any code, I can easily create tables and start using the data. It's really useful to be able to quickly set view authorizations and themes for pages.
author: Taner K.
pros: It reduces the time I spend on backend development and allows me to focus on the project.
cons: During the installation phase, I had to manually install plugins like local server, node.js and composer, which I needed to develop applications.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: RadSystems should be more improve in this software
description: As a web developer, I want to say RadSystems Developers that you can improve it and you have build good software but time to time you have to add latest and more famous features and framework/libraries in you software. If you follow steps I have mentioned, Your software will more famous as build development tool.
author: Muhammad Usman R.
pros: > Should be properly Complete Projects learning Tutorial Videos > Should be RadSystems readymade templates as like Multivendor ecommerce stores with world top 20 famous payment gate ways. And should be readymade templates as like Hospital Management, CRM, CMS, HRM, Car Rental, Real Estate, Company Portal, Inventory System, Order Management Systems, Finance System, Payroll System, Meeting & Schedule System, Multi School/College System, Dating Site System, Event System, Support Ticking System, Restaurant and Hotel System etc... > Should be multi table relational data in single page using Add, Edit, Delete, Search etc.. pages > Should be clickable SVG map, let spouse you click on a country on map then data will show from the table on the page, and google maps components. > Should be search able list combo component, Select list combo with check box, option button component > And Grid page row height options and should be complete option to customize the grid and other pages displaying data height and widths options. > Should be add Django, React/React Native, Flutter

description: I'm starting to develop some projects about business cases in class.

pros: easy and practical, I downloaded it to develop some examples in class.
cons: not have much documentation to start with rad systems are difficult to understand at the first time.

review_title: RAD Studio the perfect tool for developping
author: Younes C.
pros: complete tool for developping. the authentication system and the logging are my favorite
cons: nothing but the mobile technology is not workin every time
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: In simple words, the creators have been rude, obnoxious and unhelpful. The worse is their tutorials in both YouTube and in the website. All of them, start by assuming that we are all super users of their products. Documentation is extremely poor. I my view they should just abandon this project and move on and develop the old PHPRad.
author: Murugappan R.
pros: I have used PHPRad and it worked wonderfully well for the price and its uniqueness. Cannot say the same for the new RadSystem Studio base on Laravel (sigh!) and Quasar.
cons: I would not pay one cent for the RadSystem Studio based Laravel (sigh!) and Quasar. I could go the YouTube and do better for free and may help the creators with a bit of donation. This way it gives me the freedom to develop anything, including addons like Tailwain, Unocss etc which cannot be achieved with this expensive piece of "IDE".

author: Martin R.
pros: Good in handling, robust tool and can become the best of the word.
cons: RadSystems is a very good tool but I understand that you have to concentrate on correcting all the bugs it has. You should not keep adding frameworks until everything is corrected and I recommend that you emphasize the export area as it always has problems and more if the data includes photos, include the ability to export dashboards. It would not be bad to include to radsystems what PHPRAD 2.7.3 has as for example tables lookup and other things more. I understand that if the tool is corrected to 100% would be something explosive for the design of applications and that the tool includes the ability to add alerts with sounds. I know that I am missing many things but if they correct many things there would be a tool as powerful and robust as RadSystems and once everything is corrected then they will continue adding frimeworks. Another thing more, they should include the manual roles as phprad has because the dynamic roles in radsystems does not generate the tables many times creating problems to be able to start section.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I think the person who thought up this project is a super person. It has made a lot of things easier for me in my life. It's great to have a program like this. I highly recommend it.
cons: Supporting mega projectsSupport for large projects so that it becomes easy to create a larger project and allow more ready-made templates
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Desarrollé una app en muy poco tiempo, la cual nos ha servido en la empresa donde trabajo, la verdad fue muy rápido si desarrollo

cons: Apenas está comenzando, pocos tutoriales explicativos. Demora en las respuestas del foro
